use_cases: A clickable button for form submission and user actions
A navigation trigger for multi-step workflows
An action trigger for API calls or state changes
A styled CTA button for calls-to-action
A disabled or loading state button for async operations
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority (CVA) for flexible variant-based styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings, disabled states, and asChild prop for composition with other components.
